## Summary

- What changed?

## Testing

- [ ] `make check-local`
- [ ] `make check-web` (if browser behavior, mature app runtime, or thumbnails changed)
- [ ] `make check` (if the full local release gate was run)
- [ ] Not run locally (explain why)

## Release notes

- Does this change affect deploys, previews, thumbnails, generated files, or runtime dependencies?
